scripts.test:neos8:defaults: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos8 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test --grep @default-context
scripts.test:neos8:enforce-all: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos8 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT/EnforceForAll npx playwright test --grep '@enforce-for-all$'
